title: helianthus occidentalis
intro: Helianthus occidentalis, also known as western sunflower, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the western United States and Canada. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Helianthus occidentalis include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, and are often used to treat a range of ailments, from skin conditions to respiratory issues.
